# TS9219

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
staticAssert condition must be a compile-time constant
```

## Explanation

The condition in staticAssert() must be evaluable at compile time.

Correct:
  staticAssert(1 + 1 === 2, "math works")
  staticAssert(typeof x === "string", "x must be string")

Incorrect:
  staticAssert(fetchData().length &gt; 0, "...")  // Runtime call

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
